properties.name: Glenarm Castle & Gardens
properties.description: Explore one of Northern Ireland's oldest estates. Featuring a stunning walled garden, a charming tea room, and a fantastic woodland play area for the little ones.

properties.name: W5 Science & Discovery Centre
properties.description: The ultimate family day out! With over 250 interactive exhibits across eight themed zones, W5 offers a fun and educational experience for curious minds of all ages.
